# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build_and_upload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Node.js (example for a Node.js project)
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: '20'

    - name: Install dependencies (example)
      run: npm install

    - name: Build application (example)
      run: npm run build

    - name: Create artifact directory
      run: mkdir -p build-artifacts

    - name: Copy compiled binaries (example: dist folder)
      run: cp -r dist build-artifacts/compiled-binaries

    - name: Copy configuration files (example: config folder)
      run: cp -r config build-artifacts/configuration-files

    - name: Copy deployment scripts (example: scripts folder)
      run: cp -r scripts build-artifacts/deployment-scripts

    - name: Create a manifest file (optional)
      run: |
        echo "Build ID: ${{ github.run_id }}" > build-artifacts/manifest.txt
        echo "Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}" >> build-artifacts/manifest.txt
        echo "Built by: ${{ github.actor }}" >> build-artifacts/manifest.txt
        echo "Build Date: $(date)" >> build-artifacts/manifest.txt

    - name: Archive artifacts
      run: tar -czvf build-artifacts.tar.gz -C build-artifacts .

    - name: Upload build artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: application-build-${{ github.run_id }}
        path: build-artifacts.tar.gz
        retention-days: 7
